introSection: Heidi The Coaster is a steel spinning roller coaster owned by Schneider. It debuted at the Munich Oktoberfest 2019.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: This is the first of Reverchon's new Spinning Coaster design, officially called the second version, to open.

fullText:
Heidi The Coaster is a steel spinning roller coaster owned by Schneider. It debuted at the Munich Oktoberfest 2019.

This is the first of Reverchon's new Spinning Coaster design, officially called the second version, to open.
